title: Creator Craft
description: CreatorCraft is a new Minecraft ModPack which makes content creation easier for all creators.
body:
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

## **SUMMARY**

CreatorCraft is a ModPack which makes life easier for content creators big or small, potato or supercomputer. This includes all the tools a creator could need for almost any kind of content!

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

## **SOCIALS AND MORE INFORMATION**

(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faaf495485f37b4000d277ab50e71efb3e38f6db_0.webp) Discord server: **[https://discord.gg/VpdEGa3vyK](https://discord.gg/VpdEGa3vyK)**

 Youtube Page: [https://www.youtube.com/@Hoo1kCreatorCraft](https://www.youtube.com/@Hoo1kCreatorCraft)

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

## **WHY CREATORCRAFT**

CreatorCraft is an all in one modpack which includes all the creative tools like Replaymod or Essential necessary for creators big or small and has EhMazing optimizations.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

## **INSTALATION** 

My [Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@Hoo1kCreatorCraft) has descriptive information on how to install this modpack in multiple ways.

**I Cannot wait to see you using CreatorCraft!**

![The Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faaf495485f37b4000d277ab50e71efb3e38f6db_0.webp)
